subcodes.first_line: O thou who art steadfast in the Covenant of the Lord God! For some time no letter hath been penned, nor hath any missive been dispatched [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای ثابت بر پیمان حضرت یزدان مدتیست که نامه مرقوم نگردید و مکتوبی ارسال نگشت
subcodes.subjects: @consolation and comfort, @expressions of grief; lamentation; sadness, @rejection, opposition and persecution, @prayer for protection
